plan: In QuerySet's `query` property setter in django/db/models/query.py, detect when the assigned sql.Query was built by values()/values_list() (its `values_select` is non-empty) and reset `self._iterable_class` to ValuesIterable so rows are materialized as dicts instead of broken model instances. Currently the setter just does `self._query = value`, leaving `_iterable_class` as ModelIterable from __init__. django/db/models/sql/query.py is only relevant to confirm `values_select` survives pickling as the marker of a values query.
